text: Being here, I am struck by a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The glass walls and modern exhibits evoke a feeling of transparency and openness, as though I am invited to peer into the workings of knowledge itself. The presence of "R+D"—research and development—encourages me to reflect not only on technological progress, but on the human need to continuously question and create. Yet, the silence and sterile environment leave me feeling slightly detached, as if I am a thoughtful observer hovering on the edge of discovery.
